{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321222353EDC240BDA7FF8B5315E9"}"},"total":87},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6996940084398949133","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，还可以增长见识，书里面有好多都是我平常没有听说过的，还有一些好奇葩的鬼以及妖，我个人觉得挺好看滴(๑•̀ㅂ•́)ﾉ➹♡"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1629102067,"group_id":"6994766418524769311","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"云想衣裳花想容，春风拂槛露华浓","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw8zPYMirr8vCqUfB3N4pYVusLtaisFqcqHmZIJ3hEey","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/afe6ae9d885c44c39e1ce4e1d676123d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619334&x-signature=%2FAN3FT7Dp%2FBGaE0ia7IP2iad%2FyM%3D","user_id":"2427351394947859","user_name":"用户24273513"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2427351394947859","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1647529997,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6994766418524769311","book_info":{"abstract":"妖怪文化是东方文明中不可或缺的一种奇特文化，妖怪体现了民间的想象力与创造力。身处被传统文化熏陶过的土地，我们对某些具备民族及地域特征的妖怪并不陌生，甚至会抱有深刻的感情：比如雷峰塔下的白蛇，涂山的九尾狐……毋庸置疑，在它们的身上都深深烙印着这片土地上某些不言而喻的东西，甚至本身就是一种文化符号。妖怪的形态千奇百怪，其性却如人类一般，有善有恶，有些甚至是神奇的，且令人敬畏的。它们时而狰狞恐怖，时而滑稽可爱……它们其实是千变万化的人性缩影。
《中国妖怪大全》是中国妖怪文化的集大成之作，全书收录了305个妖怪（含136个妖魔鬼怪，125种奇禽异兽，27位神仙异人，17种仙草奇虫），217个神话故事，417幅经典绘画。从神仙异人到奇禽异兽，再到妖魔鬼怪，汇集中国各地传说、民俗和神话，配以奇幻又富有创意的插画，为读者呈现了一个光怪陆离、神秘莫测的妖怪世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/f235051a0261e3a0285a8eed4562c437~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孙见坤","author_id":"","book_id":"6994766418524769311","book_name":"中国妖怪大全","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d03020","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"143.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":948,"name":"社会文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=948&name=社会文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":974,"name":"社会人文","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=974&name=社会人文&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6994767083145792542","read_count":"6894","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"169596"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"15","tags":"社会文化,社会人文","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/f235051a0261e3a0285a8eed4562c437~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287033&x-signature=gk%2FOMklvaZ7JAy3ZhEoHTuyRUJI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.260937e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321222353EDC240BDA7FF8B5315E9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读54分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":42,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3260,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":16756},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7037708205434651428","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好棒棒，有配图也。排版看的好舒服。"}
